1 import { useState, useCallback } from 'react' 2 import Overview from './components/Overview' 3 import Portfolio from './components/Portfolio' 4 import Signals from './components/Signals' 5 import PaperTrades from './components/PaperTrades' 6 import Settings from './components/Settings' 7 import Backtest from './components/Backtest' 8 import ScannerStatus from './components/ScannerStatus' 9 10 const API = '' // relative paths — works on any host/Tailscale 11 12 export type Tab = 'overview' | 'portfolio' | 'signals' | 'paper' | 'backtest' | 'settings' 13 14 export default function App() { 15 const [tab, setTab] = useState('overview') 16 const [scanning, setScanning] = useState(false) 17 const [lastScan, setLastScan] = useState(null) 18 19 const triggerScan = useCallback(async () => { 20 setScanning(true) 21 try { 22 await fetch(`${API}/api/scan`, { method: 'POST' }) 23 setLastScan(new Date().toLocaleTimeString()) 24 } finally { 25 setScanning(false) 26 } 27 }, []) 28 29 const tabs: { id: Tab; label: string; emoji: string }[] = [ 30 { id: 'overview', label: 'Overview', emoji: '📊' }, 31 { id: 'portfolio', label: 'Portfolio', emoji: '💼' }, 32 { id: 'signals', label: 'Signals', emoji: '🚨' }, 33 { id: 'paper', label: 'Paper Trades', emoji: '📝' }, 34 { id: 'backtest', label: 'Backtest', emoji: '🔬' }, 35 { id: 'settings', label: 'Settings', emoji: '⚙️' }, 36 ] 37 38 return ( 39
